title: Meow Skulls Hearts
description: changes all hearts to Meow Skulls from fortnite
body:
Just a simple resource pack that changes all the hearts to an image of Meow Skulls, which includes
- Normal
- Frozen
- Withered
- Poisoned
- Absorbing
- All Hardcore hearts



The image that's used

![The image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e3a1a93406c983b84270a6af293fa728006e82e6.png)
